text-about-description: Learn more about me through this page!
text-always-open-external-links-in-a-new: Always open external links in a new tab
text-animations-disabled-by-system-descr: Animations are disabled by your system settings.
text-artworks-and-videos-description: Welcome to view my personal artworks and videos through other platforms!
text-artworks-description: Preferred styles: Chibi, Pixel Art. I mainly create original works, and occasionally fan-art. Commercial commissions for artworks are unavailable at this time.
text-blogs-and-sponsor-description: Welcome to read my blogs about me or my projects!
text-chatting-description: Welcome to join my chat room for interaction!
text-homepage-introduction-artworks: You might know me through my artworks and videos. You can view my more artworks from my Pixiv profile or my profile on other platforms.
text-homepage-introduction-software: You might also know me through softwares I made (such as Quanto Series). You can check my GitHub profile to view open source projects, or go to the Softwares page to see more.
text-homepage-welcome: Welcome! I'm an amateur creator. I draw something, make video, and code sometimes.
text-profile-part-1: Pronunciation: /stiːv ɕy/. You can also call me "什五 (shí wǔ, ㄕˊ ㄨˇ or ジュウゴ)". He/Him.
text-profile-part-2: I'm an amateur creator. I draw something and make video sometimes.
text-profile-part-4: I want to create more, code more and sleep more.
text-profile-part-6: Character settings of Steve Hsu in the <cite>Codename Staub</cite> worldview:
text-qq-groups-description: QQ groups are only available in Mainland China.
text-quanto-series-description: Quanto Series is a collaboration of open source projects named starting with Quanto, which are desktop customization tools based on Rainmeter.
text-quanto-series-team-email-descriptio: Only topics about the Quanto Series are allowed
text-quantum-description: Quanto Series product updates and feedback channels, discussion group for desktop customization enthusiasts
text-sponsorship-description: Sponsorship is based on the principle of voluntariness.
text-sticker-collections-description: You can download and use these stickers on platforms where they are already available. The display quality of stickers varies depending on platform requirements; please refer to the actual version.
text-sticker-collections-series-2-vol-2: Steve Hsu's SC Dynamic Edition Vol. 2
text-sticker-collections-series-2-vol-3: Steve Hsu's SC Dynamic Edition Vol. 3
text-unused-or-deprecated-links-descript: The following platform links are still kept, mainly for anti-counterfeiting purposes.
text-videos-description: Videos are uploaded irregularly. Currently the main content consists of recorded series of the video game <cite>Minecraft</cite>.
text-warning-reset-description: If you choose to continue, this will clear your preferences, including language and theme settings. After clearing, you will be redirected to the homepage.
text-you-are-about-to-leave: You are about to leave this site and go to:
